items.name: Glow from Head to Toe
items.description: A signature treatment pairing full-body massage with a rejuvenating facial massage inspired by techniques studied in China. As your body relaxes, circulation to your face is naturally encouraged, leaving your skin brighter and you feeling renewed from head to toe—perfect for weddings, dates, celebrations, or whenever you need to recharge.
story: This signature treatment combines a therapeutic full-body massage with a rejuvenating facial massage. Inspired by techniques I studied from anti-aging experts in China, it focuses on the small muscles and myofascial release on the face.

As your body relaxes, your facial muscles release tension and circulation is naturally encouraged, helping your skin appear refreshed and radiant. Many clients notice they leave looking brighter while feeling lighter from head to toe.
Unlike a traditional facial, this treatment focuses on natural relaxation and facial massage to support healthy-looking skin while giving your entire body the care it deserves.
Whether you're preparing for a special event or simply need time to recharge, this is a beautiful way to care for both your body and your face in one relaxing session.
details: 90 min: 60 min bodywork + 30 min face, eye, jaw & scalp massage
120 min: 75 min bodywork + 45 min face, eye, jaw & scalp massage. Includes deep cleansing, exfoliation, hydration, firming & lifting.
150 min: 90 min bodywork + 60 min face, eye, jaw & scalp massage. Extended relaxation and deeper rejuvenation.

items.name: Swedish Massage
items.description: Enjoy a soothing Swedish massage that uses gentle strokes to promote relaxation and improve circulation. Perfect for relieving stress, headaches, and minor aches while providing a peaceful escape from daily life.

items.name: Clinical Deep Tissue
items.description: Targeting the deep muscle and connective tissue, this treatment is highly effective for relieving chronic tension and stiffness. Optional cupping or Gua Sha add-ons available. Often shows a significant difference in just one session—fewer subsequent appointments and ultimately saves you money.

items.name: Lymphatic Drainage
items.description: A gentle massage aimed at stimulating the lymphatic system to remove toxins and increase lymph flow. Particularly beneficial for reducing swelling, improving immune function, and promoting detoxification. Ideal for those seeking relief from fluid retention or looking to boost overall health.

items.name: Fertility Massage
items.description: A nurturing therapy designed to support reproductive health and balance the body's natural cycles. Combines gentle abdominal massage, acupressure, and moxibustion to enhance blood flow to the pelvic area, reduce stress, and encourage hormonal harmony.

items.name: Dysmenorrhea Massage
items.description: Focused on relieving menstrual pain and regulating the cycle, this treatment uses warm compresses, essential oils, and acupressure techniques to ease uterine spasms and stimulate circulation. Helps reduce cramping, bloating, and lower back discomfort.

items.name: Sports Massage
items.description: Tailored for active individuals and athletes, this focused massage targets overused and tight muscles to improve flexibility, prevent injury, and accelerate recovery. Techniques such as stretching, deep compression, and trigger-point work enhance performance and relieve muscle fatigue.

items.name: Prenatal Massage
items.description: A gentle, nurturing massage designed specifically for expectant mothers. Helps ease back pain, reduce swelling, and promote better sleep by improving circulation and relieving muscle tension. Safe and supportive body positioning throughout each stage of pregnancy.

items.name: Postpartum Massage
items.description: A restorative massage designed to support new mothers through recovery after childbirth. Helps relieve tension in the back, neck, and shoulders from feeding and holding your baby, eases muscle fatigue, and encourages better circulation and relaxation. Gentle, comforting bodywork to help you feel like yourself again.

items.name: Facial Care
items.description: A rejuvenating facial treatment that blends Eastern and Western techniques to cleanse, tone, and revitalize the skin. Using natural herbal products and gentle facial massage, this session boosts circulation and leaves skin glowing, smooth, and refreshed.

items.name: Body Shaping
items.description: A specialized massage aimed at improving body contour and skin tone. Through firm, rhythmic strokes and cupping or Gua Sha techniques, this treatment stimulates metabolism, promotes lymphatic flow, and helps reduce the appearance of cellulite.
